texto: I was one of those unfortunates adopted by upper middle-class professionals and nurtured in an environment of learning, art and a socio-religious culture steeped in more than 2000 years of Talmudic tradition. Not everyone is lucky enough to have been raised in a whiskey tango trailer park by a bow-legged female whose sole qualification for motherhood is a womb that happened to catch a sperm of a passing truck driver.
explicacao: Citação de Generation Kill sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “I was one of those unfortunates adopted by upper middle-class professionals and nurtured in an en…” articula sabedoria, a, dead em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como dead e diary.
